Description: Verify all products are displayed on homepage
Steps: 1. Login as standard_user 2. Observe products page
Expected Result: 6 products are displayed on the page

Description: Sort products by Name A to Z
Steps: 1. Login 2. Click sort dropdown 3. Select Name (A to Z)
Expected Result: Products are sorted alphabetically A to Z

Description: Sort products by Name Z to A
Steps: 1. Login 2. Click sort dropdown 3. Select Name (Z to A)
Expected Result: Products are sorted alphabetically Z to A

Description: Sort products by Price low to high
Steps: 1. Login 2. Click sort dropdown 3. Select Price (low to high)
Expected Result: Products are sorted from lowest to highest price

Description: Sort products by Price high to low
Steps: 1. Login 2. Click sort dropdown 3. Select Price (high to low)
Expected Result: Products are sorted from highest to lowest price

Description: Verify product name is displayed on card
Expected Result: Every product card shows a product name

Description: Verify product price is displayed on card
Expected Result: Every product card shows a price with $ symbol

Description: Verify product image is displayed on card
Expected Result: Every product card shows a product image

Description: Click on product name to view details
Steps: 1. Login 2. Click on any product name
Expected Result: Product detail page opens with name price description and Add to cart button

Description: Verify Add to cart from product detail page
Steps: 1. Login 2. Click on any product 3. Click Add to cart
Expected Result: Item added to cart and button changes to Remove

Description: Verify Back button on product detail page
Steps: 1. Login 2. Click on any product 3. Click Back button
Expected Result: User is taken back to products listing page

Description: Verify product description is shown on detail page
Expected Result: Product detail page shows a text description

Description: Add to cart from product listing page
Steps: 1. Login 2. Click Add to cart directly from product card
Expected Result: Item is added to cart without opening detail page

Description: Remove item from product listing page
Steps: 1. Login 2. Add item to cart from listing 3. Click Remove on same card
Expected Result: Item is removed and button changes back to Add to cart

Description: Verify cart count updates on adding multiple products
Steps: 1. Login 2. Add 4 products one by one from listing page
Expected Result: Cart icon shows count 4 after each addition
